const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"independent contractor\" \"Rehabilitation Act\"",filed_before:"2026-07-17",num_results:10,fields:["id","caseName","court_citation_string","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url","status","snippet"]}); for (const c of (r.content||[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); else if (c.type==="image") image(c); }
